depression.description: I often get really excited about starting new projects, like my website, but when challenges arise, I just lose all my confidence and end up abandoning them.
I find myself constantly seeking validation on social media, and if I don't get it, I feel like I'm worthless and that my work doesn't matter.
Writing this 'living letter' to my father has brought up so many complex feelings; I want to forgive him, but I also feel so unlovable and unwanted.

depression.topic: Fear of failure in personal projects
depression.description: Whenever I reflect on my past successes, I feel anxious because I think, 'What if I fail again?' It's like I'm stuck in this cycle of fear and avoidance.
When I feel overwhelmed by my projects or emotions, I retreat into my fantasies to escape the feelings of worthlessness that come up.

Delusion.description: I believe that if I don't get constant validation from others, it means I'm not good enough or that I'm unlovable.
I often feel helpless and think that I can't succeed on my own; it's like I need others to validate my worth and efforts.
